behavior: The v3 strategy package and every unfinished maintained-doc commitment are dispositioned in one ordered, user-approved master plan before implementation begins.
revision_scope: The committed v3 master plan and priority disposition approved by the user before Milestone 0 activation.

commands.relevant_result: The active plan, feature state, architecture, workflow policy, and maintained-file coverage agree.
commands.caveat: GitHub Actions is temporarily disabled by user direction and must be restored before the draft PR is merged.

commands.relevant_result: Maintained Markdown, links, and prose pass the documentation gate.
commands.caveat: This evidence approves planning authority only; no v3 runtime behavior is implemented.
